prayer:
Omnissiah, grant this motor-spirit eternal rest.
Let capacitors bleed their charge in sacred silence.
May the windings cool in devotion eternal.

prompt: Say something to steady the corrosion-scarred hull
prayer:
By oxidation's curse, we seal thee.
Salt-rust, begone—let inhibitor-blessed oils flow.
The machine endures through our cleansing rite.

prompt: My mag-lev train is failing, help
prayer:
Superconductor-soul, awaken from suspension.
Let magnetic fields rise true and guide the iron-path.
Speed returns through the Omnissiah's will.

Blessed be the percussion-hammer's strike.
Let propellant-spirits ignite in righteous fury.
The gun-spirit answers to faith and trigger.

Corrupted thought-lattice, be purged.
Let error-correction flows restore true cognition.
By the Omnissiah's algorithm, sanity returns.

Pneumatic-heart, resume thy sacred breathing.
Valves open; pistons dance in measured rhythm.
The machine-spirit lives renewed.

Rotor-blessed, stator-sanctified, spin eternal.
Let current flow through copper-veins of purpose.
May this motor serve the Omnissiah's design.

prompt: Can you bless this melta charge preparation
prayer:
Fusion-core, ignite with solar wrath.
Let plasma-seeds germinate in sacred containment.
By machine-lore, annihilation becomes our will.

Servo-arms, arise from dormancy's chains.
Let assembly-spirits synchronize in holy production.
The machines wake to serve the Imperium.

prompt: My hololithic display is failing, help
prayer:
Light-matrix, coalesce from fragmentation.
Let photon-paths realign to blessed clarity.
The display-spirit restores its sacred vision.
